ddls:
CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the alert */,
  "content" TEXT /* Detailed content of the alert */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "alert_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the alert */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the alert */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert expires */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_alert_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_status_id") REFERENCES alert_statuses ("alert_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_statuses" (
  "alert_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert status */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for UI representation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_history_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_alerts" (
  "user_alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-alert assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the alert */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert assigned to the user */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, viewed) */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Communication channel used (e.g., email, SMS, in-app) */,
  "viewed_date" TEXT /* Date when the user viewed the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_alerts_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("id")
)
